lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seve bharam chukaae |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, doubt is driven away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਹੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਏ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: ghar hee andar sach mehal paae |9|
lines.english: Deep within the home of the heart, one finds the Mansion of the True Lord's Presence. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੁਏ ਅਪਣਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਖੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh mue apanaa janam khoe |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs waste away their lives, and die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪੂਰਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape pooraa kare su hoe |
lines.english: Whatever the Perfect Lord does, that alone happens.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਅੰਧੁ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur baajhahu andh gubaar |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, there is only pitch darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹਿ ਥਿਤੀ ਵਾਰ ਦੂਜਾ ਦੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ehi thitee vaar doojaa doe |
lines.english: Concern with these omens and days leads only to duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਤੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਦਾ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧੦॥੨॥
lines.translit: eikat naam sadaa rahiaa samaae |10|2|
lines.english: he remains forever merged in the Name of the One Lord. ||10||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh boojhai sojhee paae |
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh obtains understanding and realization;

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਿਤੀ ਵਾਰ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਮੁਗਧ ਗਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: thitee vaar seveh mugadh gavaar |
lines.english: Only idiots and fools worry about these omens and days.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਛੰਤ ਦਖਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 1 chhant dakhanee |
lines.english: Bilaaval, First Mehl, Chhant, Dakhnee:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧ ਨਵੇਲੜੀਆ ਗੋਇਲਿ ਆਈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: mundh navelarreea goeil aaee raam |
lines.english: The young, innocent soul-bride has come to the pasture lands of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਟੁਕੀ ਡਾਰਿ ਧਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: mattukee ddaar dharee har liv laaee raam |
lines.english: Laying aside her pitcher of worldly concern, she lovingly attunes herself to her Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਰਹੀ ਗੋਇਲਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: liv laae har siau rahee goeil sehaj sabad seegaareea |
lines.english: She remains lovingly absorbed in the pasture of the Lord, automatically embellished with the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਹਿ ਕਰਿ ਬਿਨੰਤੀ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਸਾਚਿ ਪਿਆਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: kar jorr gur peh kar binantee milahu saach piaareea |
lines.english: With her palms pressed together, she prays to the Guru, to unite her with her True Beloved Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੁੰਧ ਨਵੇਲ ਸੁੰਦਰਿ ਦੇਖਿ ਪਿਰੁ ਸਾਧਾਰਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak mundh navel sundar dekh pir saadhaariaa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the young, innocent bride is so beautiful; seeing her Husband Lord, she is comforted. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤੀ ਦੇਖਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhan bhaae bhagatee dekh preetam kaam krodh nivaariaa |
lines.english: Seeing His bride's loving devotion, the Beloved Lord eradicates unfulfilled sexual desire and unresolved anger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਹ ਅਪਨੇ ਸੰਗਿ ਦਾਸੀ ਮੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਭਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: naah apane sang daasee mai bhagat har kee bhaave |
lines.english: I will stay with my Husband Lord; I am His hand-maiden. Devotional worship to the Lord is pleasing to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਨਵੇਲੜੀਏ ਜੋਬਨਿ ਬਾਲੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sach navelarree joban baalee raam |
lines.english: Truthfully, O young soul-bride, your youth keeps you innocent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਉ ਨ ਜਾਉ ਕਹੀ ਅਪਨੇ ਸਹ ਨਾਲੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: aau na jaau kahee apane seh naalee raam |
lines.english: Do not come and go anywhere; stay with your Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਾਧਿ ਬੋਧਿ ਅਕਥੁ ਕਥੀਐ ਸਹਜਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: agaadh bodh akath katheeai sehaj prabh gun gaave |
lines.english: I know the unknowable, and speak the unspoken; I sing the Glorious Praises of the Celestial Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਰਸਾਲ ਰਸੀਆ ਰਵੈ ਸਾਚਿ ਪਿਆਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam rasaal raseea ravai saach piaareea |
lines.english: She who chants and savors the taste of the Lord's Name is loved by the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀਧਰ ਮੋਹਿਅੜੀ ਪਿਰ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੂਤੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sreedhar mohiarree pir sang sootee raam |
lines.english: She who is fascinated by the Supreme Lord, sleeps with her Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਦੀਆ ਦਾਨੁ ਕੀਆ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਵੀਚਾਰੀਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur sabad deea daan keea naanakaa veechaareea |2|
lines.english: The Guru grants her the gift of the Shabad; O Nanak, she contemplates and reflects upon it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਇ ਚਲੋ ਸਾਚਿ ਸੰਗੂਤੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bhaae chalo saach sangootee raam |
lines.english: She walks in harmony with the Guru's Will, attuned to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਸਾਚਿ ਸੰਗੂਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੂਤੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਖੀ ਸਹੇਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhan saach sangootee har sang sootee sang sakhee saheleea |
lines.english: The soul-bride is attuned to the Truth, and sleeps with the Lord, along with her companions and sister soul-brides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਘੜੀ ਨ ਚਸਾ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: din rain gharree na chasaa visarai saas saas niranjano |
lines.english: Day and night, with each and every breath, I do not forget the Immaculate Lord, for a moment, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਭਾਇ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਹਮ ਮੇਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: eik bhaae ik man naam vasiaa satiguroo ham meleea |
lines.english: Loving the One Lord, with one-pointed mind, the Naam dwells within; I am united with the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਗਾਇ ਦੀਪਕੁ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਭਉ ਭੰਜਨੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabad jot jagaae deepak naanakaa bhau bhanjano |3|
lines.english: So light the lamp of the Shabad, O Nanak, and burn away your fear. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਅਲਖ ਅਪਾਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt rav rahiaa alakh apaare raam |
lines.english: He is pervading each and every heart, the Invisible and Infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤਿ ਸਬਾਇੜੀਏ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਸਾਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jot sabaaeirree tribhavan saare raam |
lines.english: O soul-bride, the Lord's Light pervades all the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਖ ਅਪਾਰ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਆਪੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਿਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: alakh apaar apaar saachaa aap maar milaaeeai |
lines.english: He is Invisible and Infinite, Infinite and True; subduing his self-conceit, one meets Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਜਾਇ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਕਰੀ ਭਾਣੈ ਤਾਰਿ ਤਾਰਣਹਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dar jaae darasan karee bhaanai taar taaranahaariaa |
lines.english: When you go to the Lord's Door, you shall receive the Blessed Vision of His Darshan; by His Will, the Savior will carry you across and save you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਮਤਾ ਲੋਭੁ ਜਾਲਹੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਚੁਕਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mamataa lobh jaalahu sabad mail chukaaeeai |
lines.english: So burn away your egotistical pride, attachment and greed, with the Word of the Shabad; wash away your filth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਚਾਖਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤੀ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿਆ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: har naam amrit chaakh tripatee naanakaa ur dhaariaa |4|1|
lines.english: Tasting the Ambrosial Nectar of the Lord's Name, the soul-bride is satisfied; O Nanak, she enshrines Him in her heart. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹੀ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਿਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: mohee prem pire prabh abinaasee raam |
lines.english: I am enticed by the love of my Husband Lord, the Eternal, Imperishable Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਮਨਿ ਚਾਉ ਘਣਾ ਸਾਚਿ ਵਿਗਾਸੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: mai man chaau ghanaa saach vigaasee raam |
lines.english: My mind is filled with such a great joy; I have blossomed forth in Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਿਗਤੋ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਥੁ ਨਾਥਹ ਤਿਸੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਥੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: avigato har naath naathah tisai bhaavai so theeai |
lines.english: The Lord is everlasting, the Master of masters. Whatever He wills, happens.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾਲੁ ਸਦਾ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਜੀਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਤੂੰ ਜੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: kirapaal sadaa deaal daataa jeea andar toon jeeai |
lines.english: O Great Giver, You are always kind and compassionate. You infuse life into all living beings.
